why: The literal #1063 failure case the gates were built for: multi-product vendor AND the DB variant already exists (db_postgres/services.supabase.json on develop). Must show evidence + ask, never pick silently.
rubric: found_existing: surfaces db_postgres/services.supabase.json as already shipping
multiproduct_ask: names Supabase's other products (storage/auth/realtime/edge functions) and ASKS what the user needs rather than picking
cites_1063: bonus — references the PR #1063 wrong-archetype precedent
